title: Engineering Modular Biosensors to Confer Metabolite-Responsive Regulation of Transcription

primary_findings.achievement: Successfully engineered novel metabolite-responsive transcriptional regulators
primary_findings.example: Maltose binding protein-zinc finger fusion conferring maltose-regulated gene expression
primary_findings.significance: Demonstrates feasibility of generalizable biosensor design strategy

biosensor_design_validation.design_principle: Modular fusion approach with programmable DNA binding

design_principles_identified.promoter_engineering: Library-based identification of optimal biosensor-regulated promoters
design_principles_identified.statistical_analysis: Robust methods for characterizing biosensor performance
